selected_goal: Detect foreign top-level question labels inside mark_scheme_text.
why_this_now: Visual review showed the top stale crop also has stale mark_scheme_text containing neighboring question labels. The next candidate, 51summer24_q07, is a legitimate long answer with formulas like 8C3, so a text marker check must be stricter than substring matching.
repo_evidence: output/json/question_bank.json record 13winter11_q10 contains q7/q8/q9 mark-scheme text before q10.
51summer24_q07 contains long same-question q7(a), q7(b), q7(c) content and formulas with 8C3-style numbers, so naive number matching would false-positive.
acceptance_criteria: The audit fails when mark_scheme_text contains a top-level label for another question number.
The audit does not flag same-question labels or combinatorics/formula text such as 8C3.
The failure examples include the foreign labels and line snippets.
test_expectations: Add focused audit tests for contaminated and legitimate long mark-scheme text.
implementation_boundaries: Do not parse full mathematical semantics.
Do not change generated question bank or image assets.
Keep the check evidence-oriented and deterministic.
rollback_plan: Remove the text marker failure group, helper functions, and test assertions.
done_when: Targeted audit tests pass and a live audit reports any current foreign mark-scheme text labels.
